title: Add Internet Identity login to legal doc maker

requirements.text: Add Internet Identity authentication (passkeys, Google, Apple, or Microsoft sign-in) to the legal document maker app. The Header component must display a login button for unauthenticated users that triggers the Internet Identity flow, and show the user's profile/logout options when authenticated.

quotes: Would you like me to add Internet Identity login (passkeys, Google, Apple, or Microsoft) to your legal doc maker?

acceptanceCriteria: An unauthenticated user sees a login button in the Header that launches Internet Identity
After successful login, the Header shows the user's profile name and a logout option
Logging out returns the user to the unauthenticated state
The LoginPrompt component shown on document selection and history pages correctly triggers Internet Identity login
The ProfileSetupModal appears after first login to collect the user's full name

constraints: Authentication must use Internet Identity only — no email/password or other third-party providers
Do not modify files under frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.ts or frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts
nonGoals: Any third-party OAuth providers outside of what Internet Identity supports
Changes to document generation or template logic
